note: Per-item output includes strongest granted PermissionLevelId. HasPermission can be null when strongest level is Own/MyReports and no affected target is provided.
columnOrder: PermissionId, ExternalConsultantPermissionId, PermissionMethodId, AffectedConsultancyUserId, AffectedConsultantId, HasPermission, PermissionLevelId, IsError, ErrorReason

fieldDescriptions.PermissionId: Permission identifier from input item (or null for payload-level error rows).
fieldDescriptions.ExternalConsultantPermissionId: Optional alternate permission identifier used when the affected consultant is external; otherwise the base PermissionId remains in effect.
fieldDescriptions.PermissionMethodId: Permission method identifier from input item (nullable, or null for payload-level error rows).
fieldDescriptions.AffectedConsultancyUserId: Affected consultancy user from input item (nullable, or null for payload-level error rows).
fieldDescriptions.AffectedConsultantId: Affected consultant from input item (nullable, or null for payload-level error rows).
fieldDescriptions.HasPermission: Final decision for the item. FALSE when IsError is true; nullable for target-dependent unresolved checks.
fieldDescriptions.PermissionLevelId: Strongest granted permission level id (All > MyReports > Own > On) when no error, otherwise null.
fieldDescriptions.IsError: True for payload-level and item-level validation errors.
fieldDescriptions.ErrorReason: Human-readable error reason. Null when IsError is false.
